# mtncloud_wiki_page (Resource)

Manages an MTN Cloud wiki page.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "mtncloud_wiki_page" "runbook" {
  name     = "Deployment Runbook"
  category = "ops"
  content  = <<-EOT
    # Deployment Runbook

    1. Provision the instance.
    2. Attach the network.
    3. Apply security groups.
  EOT
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name (title) of the wiki page.

### Optional

- `category` (String) Category the wiki page belongs to.
- `content` (String) Markdown content of the wiki page.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the wiki page.
